title: Snap, Segment, Deploy: A Visual Data and Detection Pipeline for Wearable Industrial Assistants
problem_statement: Manufacturing assembly tasks are increasingly complex, leading to steep learning curves for new workers, extended training periods, and higher error rates. Existing assistance solutions are often underexplored for on-device industrial use, relying on cloud infrastructure, requiring manual annotation, or failing under practical constraints like limited compute, offline usage, and strict data privacy.
proposed_solution: A mobile-device-based, real-time, multimodal industrial assistance system that provides context-aware guidance during assembly tasks using a three-stage pipeline.

pipeline_stages.name: Snap
pipeline_stages.description: Collects multi-angle part videos and real-world background images from industrial environments.

pipeline_stages.name: Segment
pipeline_stages.description: Extracts instance masks using SAM2 and generates a synthetic dataset (Gear8) by compositing parts into factory scenes.

pipeline_stages.name: Deploy
pipeline_stages.description: Integrates a lightweight object detector into a wearable assistant system featuring speech input, visual recognition, knowledge retrieval, and audio feedback.

data.data_collection_method: Multi-angle part videos and real-world background images are composited to create training data.

modules.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Engine
modules.function: Generates part-specific responses using a knowledge base.

methods: Extensive experiments on the Gear8 dataset.

contributions: Design of a real-time, multimodal assistant system for mobile industrial deployment, integrating visual detection, voice interaction, and on-device LLM-powered responses.
Proposal of a fully automated data generation pipeline (Snap, Segment, Deploy) to create training data without manual annotations.
Introduction of a two-stage training approach, Background-Agnostic Refinement (BAR), to improve detector generalization under domain shift.
Creation of the Gear8 synthetic dataset.
